goal: controlflow-verify emits one of three verdicts (APPROVED / NEEDS_REVISION / REJECTED) with confidence scoring and caps driven by governance/runtime-policy.json#verdict_routing.

verdicts.APPROVED: All checks pass, Phase 1 actionable, criteria measurable. Proceed to implementation.
verdicts.NEEDS_REVISION: Ambiguous Phase 1, no rollback on destructive change, unverified paths, or vague criteria. List each finding with the exact section reference; re-audit after fix.
verdicts.REJECTED: Structural flaw; scope not deliverable as authored. Explain blockers; ask the user for direction; do not start coding.

assertions: controlflow-verify SKILL.md defines the three verdicts APPROVED / NEEDS_REVISION / REJECTED with their trigger conditions.
governance/runtime-policy.json verdict_routing.verdicts has exactly APPROVED, NEEDS_REVISION, REJECTED.
governance/runtime-policy.json verdict_routing.confidence_thresholds is the single source of truth for 0.9 / 0.85 / 0.7.
uncertain >= 2 caps confidence at 0.85; any HIGH-impact open question caps at 0.7.
The verifier must score independently and not substitute the planner's confidence value.
